data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified: (1) skills/knots.md and skills/knots_e2e.md match the exact content from the knot notes, (2) managed inventory correctly reduced to knots and knots-e2e only, (3) install/uninstall/update output now lists each exact SKILL.md path instead of opaque counts, (4) eligibility logic matches the knot description (install when tool root exists but SKILL.md absent; inverse for uninstall), (5) project-level preference for Claude/OpenCode with user-level fallback, (6) doctor reports missing skills with exact paths and remediation command, (7) interactive update prompts list missing paths and non-interactive fails clearly, (8) all tests updated to verify path-level output, (9) make sanity passes at 95.04% coverage, (10) all files under 500 lines, (11) no security issues.
